pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities with libraries targeting Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 bytecode generation or language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag ensures the compiler targets Java 21 APIs and bytecode version; without it, the code may not compile or run correctly on Java 21.
